Operation 'listDecisionServices' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_output_details, poor_ai_interpretability. Original description is repetitive and provides no context about what data is returned or how an AI agent should use this operation. Enhanced version clarifies the operation returns a collection with metadata, helping agents understand when to call this for service discovery.

data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a list of all decision services available on the server. Returns a collection of decision service metadata including identifiers, names, and versions. Useful for discovering available decision services before execution.
